{{Quote|Jaar. Sweetened alcoari milk and vineberry extract. It's too sweet for my taste, but you might like it.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to [[Jarik Solo]]|<ref name="RD">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>}}
'''Jaar''' was a sweetened [[alcoari milk]] and [[vineberry]] extract beverage given to [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] children.
